tasks.subject: Task 1: Add disk space + archive diagnostics helpers
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add two pure, testable helpers to `CrawlerManager`: `_estimate_archive_required_bytes` and `_get_archives_disk_state`. Both fail-open on error.

**Files:**
- Modify: `apps-microservices/crawler-service/app/core/crawler_manager.py`
- Modify: `apps-microservices/crawler-service/tests/test_crawler_manager.py`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `_estimate_archive_required_bytes(job_storage_path)` returns `int(size * 1.5)` or 0 on error
- [ ] `_get_archives_disk_state(archives_dir)` returns `{free_bytes, total_bytes, used_pct, file_count, oldest_file_age_seconds}` dict
- [ ] `file_count` excludes `.staging/` subdirectory
- [ ] Both helpers fail-open
- [ ] 7 new tests pass

**Verify:** `cd apps-microservices/crawler-service && pytest tests/test_crawler_manager.py::TestArchiveDiskPreflight -v`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["apps-microservices/crawler-service/app/core/crawler_manager.py", "apps-microservices/crawler-service/tests/test_crawler_manager.py"], "verifyCommand": "cd apps-microservices/crawler-service && pytest tests/test_crawler_manager.py::TestArchiveDiskPreflight -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["helpers added", "7 tests pass", "fail-open", ".staging/ excluded"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Integrate pre-flight check and diagnostics into archive_crawl
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Insert pre-flight disk space check in `archive_crawl` between the GCS fallback and the snapshot/archive creation. Log baseline disk state. Reject with 503 `INSUFFICIENT_DISK_SPACE` when free < required. Log state again in the failure path.

**Files:**
- Modify: `apps-microservices/crawler-service/app/core/crawler_manager.py`
- Modify: `apps-microservices/crawler-service/tests/test_crawler_manager.py`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Baseline disk state logged
- [ ] Required bytes floored at 1 GB
- [ ] 503 raised with `INSUFFICIENT_DISK_SPACE` error_code
- [ ] Post-failure disk state logged
- [ ] All existing tests still pass

**Verify:** `cd apps-microservices/crawler-service && pytest tests/test_crawler_manager.py -v`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["apps-microservices/crawler-service/app/core/crawler_manager.py", "apps-microservices/crawler-service/tests/test_crawler_manager.py"], "verifyCommand": "cd apps-microservices/crawler-service && pytest tests/test_crawler_manager.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["pre-flight check inserted", "503 on insufficient space", "baseline + failure logs", "1 GB floor"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Document pre-flight behavior in CLAUDE.md
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add a sub-section documenting the pre-flight disk space check, 503 response, and fail-open policy.

**Files:**
- Modify: `apps-microservices/crawler-service/CLAUDE.md`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Pre-flight check + 503 shape documented
- [ ] Fail-open policy stated
- [ ] Spec reference included

**Verify:** `grep -q 'INSUFFICIENT_DISK_SPACE' apps-microservices/crawler-service/CLAUDE.md`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["apps-microservices/crawler-service/CLAUDE.md"], "verifyCommand": "grep -q 'INSUFFICIENT_DISK_SPACE' apps-microservices/crawler-service/CLAUDE.md", "acceptanceCriteria": ["INSUFFICIENT_DISK_SPACE documented", "fail-open explained", "spec link"]}
```
